datasetAgreementGeneral: This Random Survival Forest model is developed for ensemble-based survival analysis applicable to both oncological and chronic disease research. Access is open to all qualified researchers regardless of domain.
term1: You acknowledge that this model is designed exclusively for survival analysis research and must not be applied to clinical decisions without appropriate validation.
term2: You agree not to use this model for any illegal, unethical, or harmful activities.
term3: You are required to provide proper attribution to the model developers in all publications and presentations.
term4: You accept that all outcomes are solely at your discretion and the developers disclaim any liability.
term5: You agree not to redistribute this model to third parties without explicit written permission.
term6: You acknowledge that the use of this model is governed by all relevant legal, ethical, and regulatory guidelines applicable to health research.
